uplink.description: Clamp metering frame: current, voltage and active power for one clamp (socket 0 / channel 0)
uplink._note: Synthetic clamp frame built to the upstream object-stream layout (header 0x00 + declared length, then three type-0x40 clamp objects with measure codes 1=current/10=voltage/4=power). expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: current 5000 mA, voltage 230 V, power 1500 W) and mapping mA->A (power.current), V (power.voltage), W (power.active); each clamp is also surfaced in the channels extra. Satisfies power-meter (power.current/voltage/active).

uplink.description: Declared payload length does not match actual length -> error
uplink._note: The header's declared length byte must equal total length - 2; a mismatch is rejected (mirrors the upstream guard).
